view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting room and generates a link for each appointment. This is explicitly stated in the scenario where the link is included in the confirmation email and is unique to each meeting, thus confirming the requirement for 'Unique link per meeting (security)'. The evidence supports the requirement satisfaction directly, as it shows the link is generated at booking and expires after the meeting, ensuring it is not reused.
